title: Finishing the twin - DRM.jl + drmTMB
subtitle: Mission control for the evidence-led R-Julia distributional-regression twin. A row is not done unless engine, bridge, point estimates, CI/status, tests, docs, visuals, issue evidence, and Rose audit agree.

slices.name: Build static mission-control dashboard source
Serve live copy from /tmp/drm-dashboard on port 8765
Record issue-led start note
Add check-log and after-task evidence
Freeze unsupported-claim language
Create canonical finish matrix with engine, bridge, inference, docs, visual, and release columns
Wire README, ROADMAP, NEWS, docs, pkgdown, and dashboard to the matrix
Add matrix lint/check later so public claims cannot drift
Rose signoff on fitted, planned, missing, and unsupported rows
Audit every R-side Julia bridge reject against DRM.jl capabilities
Add generated gate-vs-engine CI guard
Reserve engine_control targets and reject unsupported values
Document intentional rejections
Standardize CI-status vocabulary
Keep useful point estimates when Wald inference is unsafe
Promote Gaussian phylogenetic SD profile/bootstrap parity target
Add no-speed-headline-without-inference-headline checks
Random slopes: independent, correlated, structured
Non-Gaussian coefficient parity before variance and correlation claims
Bivariate and mixed-family rho12/cross-family gate
High-q q4 then q8 correlation gate
Animal, phylo, relmat, spatial, kernel, and SPDE provenance gates
Benchmark native TMB, R-Julia bridge, and direct DRM.jl
Separate cold, warm, marshalling, kernel, profile, and bootstrap timings
Borrow HSquared AI-REML lessons only for exact Gaussian MME cells
Pilot observed-information or natural-gradient covariance updates
Keep GPU/backend language planned until benchmark evidence exists

matrix.next: Serve at port 8765 and keep JSON current.
Wire public docs and dashboard to the matrix.
Promote only after native R, bridge, and direct Julia parity are in the matrix.
Keep experimental until DRM.jl#280-style recovery and bridge labels pass.
Use likelihood/FIML masks; no mean-imputation shortcut.
No speed headline without point-estimate and CI/status parity.

active_work.text: Phase 0/1 backbone is locally implemented; next slice is the actual gate-vs-engine CI guard.
Keeping speed, bridge, and CI claims marked partial or planned until evidence lands.

activity.text: Verified dashboard render at http://127.0.0.1:8765/ with metric cards, roadmap phases, and matrix rows.
Fetched drmTMB#544 successfully; issue-comment write blocked by integration permissions.

blockers.item: Connector can read drmTMB#544 but comment write returned 403; gh CLI is not installed.
Current Julia route is the default DRM.jl fitting path only; no selectable Julia algorithm claim.

evidence.text: Dashboard source lives under docs/dev-log/dashboard, refreshes status.json plus sweep.json every 8 seconds, and renders in the in-app browser.
drmTMB#544 is the active bridge-gate epic.
Rows separate engine, bridge, point estimate, Wald, profile, bootstrap, and next-gate status.
